displayTitle: Match the Machine to the Job

beats.narration: Magnetic particle gear runs from a lathe-sized bench to a yoke you carry one-handed, and none of it is interchangeable.

payload.title: MATCH THE MACHINE
payload.sub: From lathe-sized bench units to one-hand yokes.

beats.narration: Five questions drive the choice: what magnetizing current, where is the test, what is the material, why are you testing, and how much area.
Then the hardware: stationary wet benches for production, mobile power packs wheeled to large weldments, portable yokes and prods that climb anywhere.
The production standard: the part clamps in for a head shot, a circular field, then a coil slides over it for longitudinal magnetization.
So the rule: match the machine to the job. Current, location, material, purpose, coverage. Answer all five, and the inspection falls into place.
